item.description: Golf clap to whomever did this! Thanks for FP (AND the accolade), you wonderful people. Happy Pride!
item.dc:creator: DesdemonaMoor

item.title: Lucy - Fallout Cosplay
item.description:
I love Lucy! Here is my Fallout Cosplay - me as Lucy MacLean from the series. I got so many requests to do this cosplay once this series came out, so I had to do it! Plus, it was a good excuse to finally do a vault dweller look, something I have wanted to do forever. Hope you enjoy!
Reference Character (Show is pretty fun to check out if you haven't yet!)
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Well done lads!!!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Made another curvy thing.
item.description:
Radiused banquette for a beach house in Delaware. Three drawers below seat flanked by two cylindrical cabinets. Walnut and matching walnut veneers running horizontally. Transioning from concave to convex. Lots of fun.
Drawer case, seat, seat back, plinth bases, drawer front forms and cylindrical cabinet form made with CNC.
Sorry for the selfie.
The grandpa of all forms. Core (3/8”, 1/8” barrel cut banding ply) and walnut veneers laminated with west system epoxy using metal band clamps. Formica faced call with several layers of 3/8” bending ply outside.
Finished product at night.
item.dc:creator: oldselmersaxguy1

item.title: Images of Note: My internet is shit
item.description:
Give me Kronk Anakin.
Jeremy Cunt is why I fucking hate people in authority talking about shit they don't know about. http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
Do it. Do it.
When I have a moment I usually watch cab view videos or plane accident videos.
This is the best thing I have ever seen.
"AI will solve everything" The AI:
This is the gayest thing I have seen today
My mum when I was 6
Something tells me this has happened before.
I still think about flowers for Algernon.
I need to write this in all caps: MEMBERS OF THE BRITISH GOVERNMENT ARE OPENLY ADVOCATING FOR CONVERSION THERAPY FOR TRANSGENDER PEOPLE, INCLUDING A CERTAIN LESBIAN MSP! FUCK. CONVERSION. THERAPY.
HELL YEAH WOMEN 2 JUST DROPPED
As a former cashier, I wish I could've done this.
This is my favourite video ever.
I AM GOING TO COMMIT VARIOUS UNFORGIVABLE WARCRIMES
byeh
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Sitting vigil
item.description:
I posted some pictures of him a few days ago when he started his final journey. I'm amazed he's still here, but he's got 3 paws on the Bridge. As long as he's not in pain, not suffering, we're just sitting with him and keeping him comfortable. If he does start to show signs of hurting, we'll figure out a way to pay his toll. He was a shelter rescue at 16, 22 now. I won't take him back to the shelter for euth because he wouldn't understand and would think he was being abandoned again. My heart is breaking in slow motion. Extra front page edit: Such an outpouring of love! The best weirdos in the world hang out here.
Willis tax. Front page edit: I've been telling Willis how much Imgur loves him. Thank you, lovely people. I ask that new commentors please refrain from telling me about how his vet could make a house call. If it's a story about your experience, please do, that's awesome. But if it's just advice, it's not helping to repeat it. Thank you.
item.dc:creator: AngryBisexualWithAKeyboard

item.title: Commissions are open!
item.description: https://ko-fi.com/miagabriella/commissions Little bit of shameless promo for my commissions! Opened some new commission options and keen to make some art! Done a few diff price ranges! If you have any non sfw commissions just message me privately please outside of kofi! And to all of those who love my art and can’t afford to support me I still really appreciate the love of what I do and what I post. Thanks so much for the continued support. Please don’t feel any pressure to commission just cuz u love my art!

item.dc:creator: chrisjfinlay

item.title: Spent 2 Years Painting this Overly Canadian Portrait of Ryan Reynolds & We’re Trying to Get Him to See it!
item.description: Introducing the “Ryan Reynolds Canadian Essentials” Portrait! This took 2 years to paint & we’re hoping Ryan Reynolds can see it because we’re selling prints of it for charity to raise as much as we can for our local Humane Society! It’s a really Canadian portrait just in time for Canada Day & the great release of Deadpool in a month! Can you help us share/boost so Ryan can see?! #ryanreynolds #canada #canada_day #art #deadpool #portrait #painting
item.dc:creator: LittleLo

item.title: Ernest vs the Killer Klowns
item.description: Pretty cool fact, both of these movies scared the shit out of me as a child. Ernest was one of my heroes. He could take the most difficult and scary of situations in stride and still find humor in it. Thinking back on it now I think that laid the groundwork for humor being a major coping mechanism in my life. I remember watching all of his movies on VHS. I forgot to return one of them for like 2 weeks and it cost me my allowance for a month in late fees lol
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 198)
item.description:
Welcome to the 198th edition in this series, let's do some good today. Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 197) https://imgur.com/gallery/KgqlsIO Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 196) https://imgur.com/gallery/8cXisGQ Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 195) https://imgur.com/gallery/CCZXP4o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 194) https://imgur.com/gallery/j8e1zRE Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 193) https://imgur.com/gallery/zUNZTnO Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 192) https://imgur.com/gallery/ef4CV1o Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Day 191) https://imgur.com/gallery/Cg6iteN Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 181-190) https://imgur.com/a/g3sTR0J Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 171-180) https://imgur.com/a/7OnodoA Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 161-170) https://imgur.com/a/3SfMNfg Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 151-160) https://imgur.com/a/a3npRvx Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (Days 100-150) https://imgur.com/a/rdkioD9 Here are 20 wholesome things, you deserve them (First 100 days) https://imgur.com/a/SGVY2vD
I worked overnights at a major downtown gas station my first year of recovery, it's a brutal job Sometimes making other people happy is a great place to find your own happiness.
Nanna Pants
https://www.district10market.com/ *the next video is loud*
Good Boy Ollie
Representation matters.
IT'S MY OLD BEAUTIFUL DOG AND EVERYONE SEEMS TO LOVE HER AND IT MAKES ME REALLY HAPPY
. . . Watching so many Imgurians wish @SuicidalBallsack a happy birthday after their family forgot the year before was beautiful Maybe we can get some more "Happy belated birthday"s to them below!
We've raised over $3,000 for Healing Hearts Rescue in just a couple days it's been amazing! If you're able to help them continue saving dogs like Nanna I hope you'll consider supporting them below. Even $10-20 goes so far with a rescue league https://healingheartsrescue.org/donate/ ... If you're able to send Healing Hearts something off their wishlist it would go to help dogs like Snoop #1 transition to a loving foster home https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/35V4LNUKMQJVT ... Thank you all for being there for me this week.
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: This dude is DONE with FB Marketplace
item.dc:creator: LookBackInShame

item.title: Just a little bit of my daily work-from-home activities.
item.description:
My partner and I are textile artists based in Lisbon - Portugal. We sell our creations at local art fairs and online. Here's my partner packing some orders. I'm not a big fan of this part of the job, but he enjoys it (luckily).
We both spend some time at the computer since things won’t organize or sell on their own.
Here the packages are ready to fly. Most of our customers are from the United States and Europe, but we have already sold to more than 84 different countries.
Our work is mostly inspired by everyday common dramas, memes, and funny stuff. For example, this one was created inspired by the universal hatred for printers. Since we need them almost daily, the struggle is real.
Here is a bit of the material we use for embroidery.
Anyway, where we really spend most of our time during the day is embroidering! About 6-8 hours per day, 5 days a week.
Our process is entirely done by hand, like the process we use to print some of our tote bags.
Even though our hobby has turned into our full-time job, we still find great pleasure in embroidering.
It's amazing to think that something we made by hand is in someone else's home on the opposite side of the globe. Or that a shirt we hand-embroidered is being worn by someone right now.
A few times a month, we have to go out to buy materials like packaging and threads, for example. It's good to get out of the house sometimes, hehe!
These are the hoops in which we frame the wall decor pieces we embroidered. They are made of high-quality bamboo, and we buy them wholesale because we use them a lot.
Not having a steady income is strange and sometimes stressful, but the freedom of working for ourselves doing what we love is worth it!
We also make weekly trips to the post office.
Weekends are when we some attend art fairs
The atmosphere and behind-the-scenes of these fairs and markets are very pleasant; it's time well spent. There's a sense of 'we're all in the same boat,' unlike the corporate environment where everyone is trying to outdo each other.
Dear Imgurians, support independent artists! Rest assured that every time you do this, you're making someone's day better. I also consistently make an effort to buy from small businesses and local producers. The thought that I'm not directly contributing to some billionaire buying another yacht truly makes me happy, hehe! Best wishes from Portugal! Edit: Woow! Most Viral! Thanks for the love, fellow Imgurians! If you guys would like to grab or see more of our work, you can do so here: https://rebordacaoembroidery.etsy.com
item.dc:creator: rebordacao

item.dc:creator: zakiamon

item.title: Thanks O'Karma!
item.description: It is a thing of beauty - I just found out that the person who dismissed me last month "without cause" got fired herself in the most poetic way: she went into a meeting expecting to renegotiate her contract but the Board instead terminated her on the spot, and demanded she turn over her keys and company phone! Oh, the irony! Thanks O'Karma ☺️ PS: I'm in the process of appealing this with the Union but it is SLOW. Any Lawyers out there willing to share some knowledge? Edit: Thanks for the front page imgur, and sincere apologies for the red rad mix-up. Some have speculated that this may be why I was fired in the first place :) Also, @Eiladar, 'Schadenfired' is *chef's kiss*
item.dc:creator: Yermamma
